_comment: Raw VLM inference output for mock.png (qwen3-vl via Ollama). Coordinates are in 0-1000 space as returned by the model. Normalisation to 0-1 is done in vlm_parser.py.
scene: A wooden workbench with a red plastic cube on the left and a green rectangular storage container on the right. A robotic gripper is visible at the top of the frame, hovering above the workspace.
